headline: How The Home Depot (HD) Story Is Shifting After Q4 Rally And Mixed Macro Signals
summary: Home Depot’s fair value estimate has been fine tuned to US$408.18 from US$409.84, a very small price target adjustment that still matters if you are tracking the story closely. This tweak lines up with research that sees solid long term earnings power but some caution after the Q4 run up and mixed macro signals. Read on to see how these shifting targets, both bullish and bearish, can help you follow the evolving narrative around Home Depot’s shares. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture...

headline: Home Depot's headquarters: Everything you need to know
summary: Home Depot opened its first store in Atlanta, Georgia, and subsequently made the area its global headquarters. Founded in 1978, the home improvement retailer has an international reach, operating more than 2,359 stores in the U.S. and its territories, Canada, and Mexico. The brand's executive and ...
